title: 无标题文章
summary: We just released Mastodon 4.5.11 and 4.4.18. These versions contain a medium and a high severity security fixes as well as other bugfixes. Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page. https:// github.com/mastodon/mastodon/r eleases # MastoAdmin
content:
We just released Mastodon 4.5.11 and 4.4.18.

These versions contain a medium and a high severity security fixes as well as other bugfixes.

Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page.

https://github.com/mastodon/mastodon/releases

#MastoAdmin
